name: Cala Presili
description: A small virgin cove next to Cala Tortuga, at the foot of the Favàritx Lighthouse within the natural park. It is usually combined with Tortuga on the same walk, its quiet assured by controlled access.

highlights: the wild swim at the foot of the Favàritx lighthouse
combining it with Cala Tortuga, its neighbour, on the same day
in summer reached by seasonal bus, not by car
